CommunityApplications.Profile:
# Vellichor
Fork with **Intel Arc & AMD GPU support** (from woodscode/vellichor-web).
**Vellichor** turns your written stories and ebooks into narrated audiobooks using the [Kokoro-82M](https://huggingface.co/hexgrad/Kokoro-82M) TTS model. Features multi-voice character casting (rule-based or AI Smart cast via Ollama), background ambience mixing, chaptered **M4B** + per-chapter **MP3** output, and auto-export to an Audiobookshelf library.
**GPU support:** NVIDIA CUDA (mature), Intel Arc via OpenVINO/IPEX (supported), AMD via Vulkan (experimental). Falls back to CPU automatically. Two Unraid templates are included — pick the one for your GPU.
For setup, configuration, and support, see the [project README](https://github.com/adam2893/vellichor-web) and [open an issue](https://github.com/adam2893/vellichor-web/issues).
